title: Junior Data Analyst
required_skills: Attention to detail and organisational skills
bonus_skills: Background in Data Analytics, Business Analytics, Statistics, or related field
Experience with database systems or data visualisation platforms
Prior reporting, research, administration, or operational support experience
matched_skills: Power BI (Microsoft Certified PL-300) — directly satisfies BI/reporting tools requirement
MS Excel and Google Looker Studio — satisfies spreadsheets/reporting tools requirement
KPI & performance reporting at HSBC (C-suite dashboards, burn-rate reports) and Hapag-Lloyd (sprint review reports) — satisfies data analysis and reporting requirement
Data storytelling and translating complex data into structured insight narratives (HSBC) — satisfies communication/presentation requirement
Budget variance dashboards across USD 8M programme (HSBC) — demonstrates data accuracy and quality management
Master of Management & Entrepreneurship (Leuphana) — partially satisfies analytics/business background bonus
Reporting and operations support experience across multiple roles — satisfies prior experience bonus
JIRA, Confluence, Google Looker Studio — database/platform experience bonus
missing_skills: No formal background in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or Information Systems
No explicit SQL or Python/R for data querying — JD implies statistical/quantitative analytical skills beyond dashboards
No direct data validation or database management experience cited
core_responsibilities: Gather, organise and analyse data from multiple sources
Prepare reports, dashboards and data summaries
Monitor data quality and identify trends and patterns
Maintain accurate records within databases and reporting systems
Collaborate with teams to support operational and strategic objectives
recommended_emphasis: Lead with the Power BI PL-300 certification prominently — this directly addresses the BI/reporting tools requirement
Expand the HSBC bullet on budget dashboards to mention data validation, data accuracy, and multi-dimensional analysis techniques
Add a bullet at Hapag-Lloyd emphasising data quality control and trend identification in sprint performance data
Quantify analytical outputs: e.g., 'produced weekly burn-rate dashboards tracking 6 workstreams across USD 8M programme'
summary: Strong match at 78.6%. The candidate's Power BI certification, executive dashboard experience at HSBC, and KPI reporting work at Hapag-Lloyd directly cover the core requirements. The main gap is the absence of formal quantitative/statistical training and SQL/database querying skills, but the JD does not hard-require these. Worth applying — the PL-300 certification alone differentiates the candidate from typical junior applicants.
